---
title: "Feature Object Schemas"
subtitle: "Required fields for `FeatureSeries/v1`, `EventSeries/v1`, and `TrackSeries/v1`."
sidebar: spec
---

## `FeatureSeries/v1`

Required fields:

- `values`: array with time on axis 0 and at least one feature axis.
- `times_s`: one-dimensional floating array with the same length as `values.shape[0]`.
- `dims`: tuple whose first entry is `time` and whose length matches `values.ndim`.
- `coords`: dictionary of coordinate labels.
- `metadata`: dictionary containing `extractor_id` and `params_hash`.
- `schema`: string, currently `FeatureSeries/v1`.

## `EventSeries/v1`

Required fields:

- `onset_s`: one-dimensional floating array.
- `offset_s`: one-dimensional floating array with the same shape as `onset_s`.
- `label`: optional array with one label per event.
- `confidence`: optional array with one confidence value per event.
- `extra`: dictionary of event-level arrays.
- `metadata`: dictionary containing `extractor_id` and `params_hash`.
- `schema`: string, currently `EventSeries/v1`.

## `TrackSeries/v1`

Required fields:

- `times_s`: one-dimensional floating array.
- `track_id`: one-dimensional array of track identifiers.
- `values`: array with time on axis 0 and track on axis 1.
- `dims`: tuple whose first entries are `time` and `track`.
- `coords`: dictionary of coordinate labels.
- `metadata`: dictionary containing `extractor_id` and `params_hash`.
- `schema`: string, currently `TrackSeries/v1`.
